你須要接JOB、安全地運貨到目的地、仲要自己入油、打燈、扭軚、望鏡，見到紅燈仲要停

Geralt is now in Euro Truck Simulator 2

You may not know the name Doug Cockle, but the odds are pretty good that you know his work. He provided the voice of Geralt, The Witcher, guiding the character from humble roots in 2007 to major mainstream success as one of the most recognizable and fully-realized videogame protagonists of all time. And with that great character finally retired in The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt's acclaimed 2016 DLC Blood and Wine, Cockle has now moved on to his next big role: An optional GPS voice in Euro Truck Simulator 2.

"You're going too fast!" Geralt—that is, Cockle—says in this video courtesy of YouTuber Milan. The relevant bit begins at 1:10 and is entitled Doug (Raspy), although I'm not sure if that's the official description or just something he came up with. Either way, it's appropriate, and when Doug tells me to "get ready to turn left," you better believe my hand is moving to the turn signal with a quickness.

The voice isn't quite dead-on Geralt but it's close enough that when he says "It's all over now" as the driver pulls into the lot, it makes me think that somebody wasn't checking their blind spot before changing lanes—and that there will be consequences.

ETS2 1.35 已推出

We're happy to announce that after spending some time in internal testing, Experimental Beta and Public Beta, the Euro Truck Simulator 2 Update 1.35 is now ready for all trucking enthusiasts!

As we have said before, this update is really huge so we'd like to thank all those who helped us in testing it. Due to its size, we won't describe all the details here again (read the Public Beta article please).

Instead, we'd like to address some questions regarding a new feature that was added only a few days ago; GPS voice navigation. As with many other features, please do consider this to be the initial phase. For now, you can choose from 9 different language options (English, French, Italian, German, Spanish, Russian, Polish, Turkish and Mandarin Chinese), but we do plan to add more in the future, in addition to other improvements. The beta feedback we've received so far has been really positive, but don't be shy about adding your own on our forum. Your opinion is important to us!

And for those who like short recap videos, here's ours for this content-packed update!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0spF3OFQj1U

To enjoy the 1.35 update, make sure to OPT OUT of beta branches and your game will be automatically updated on Steam.

For the legacy non-Steam edition of ETS2, the update should be ready in a few days.

Some mods, however, may have not caught up yet - this update may effectively break them. So remember that you can always stay on 1.34 or an even older branch. The way to access and select them is: Steam client → LIBRARY → right click on Euro Truck Simulator 2 → Properties → Betas tab → select the version you want.

Changelog:

MAP
Germany improvements, stage 2
New French roads: A10-A6 (Vive la France! DLC) and A6-N44
Sardinia island (Italia DLC)
Scandinavian signage improvements (Scandinavia DLC)
New special transport routes (various DLCs)

VEHICLES
Purchased container trailers
Purchased logging trailers
Browse purchased trailers & accessories
Double trailers in Germany and Netherlands
Krone Boxliner for 40ft or 2x20ft containers (Krone DLC)
Purchased Schwarzmüller reefer, curtain and log trailers; also traffic (Schwarzmüller DLC)
Adjust purchased trailers without service visit (extendable trailer, sliding tandem)
Copy truck/trailer configuration across fleet
Wiper settings improved

FEATURES
GPS Voice navigation
Use your own purchased trailers in External Contracts (WoTR)
Online garage purchase
Emergency refuelling service
Input improvements (Steam controller support, Tobii eye tracker support, controller hotplug support, better FF on Linux)
Razer Chroma support (RGB)
New options: truck stability, truck suspension, cabin suspension, dual localization of names in map
Faster job generation for hired drivers
Lots of new drivers to hire
Experimental DX11 support

MOD
Curve item (new editor item)
Walker/mover item improvement
Multiple LODs for models
Modded trucks support (in-game function)
Traffic data improvement
Vehicle data improvement (COG, wipers, transmission names, bracers sound)
Randomized cargo model (eg. container color)

Forward from Ruben from tmp official group

TRUCKERSMP & PROMODS



Since yesterday we officially know what the big surprise is TMP is working on: TMP + PROMODS!



WHEN DOES IT GET RELEASED?

The release is planned for the end of this month September, but it's more likely it'll be there mid-October.



WHAT DOES THIS MEAN FOR PEOPLE WHO DON'T HAVE PROMODS?

Nothing changes. The servers that are around right now will still be around and available. You don't need ProMods to be able to play on the multiplayer.



WHAT DO WE KNOW?

• ProMods is going to run on a separate server.

• That server will start out with 2500 slots and will get raised up to 4200 slots.

• People who already use ProMods will have to update to a new version.

• We will need all road DLC's to be able to use ProMods.

• External Contracts do not work on ProMods.

• It is not certain yet if there are going to be restrictions for double trailers. This still needs to be determined.

• Is there going to be a winter mod for ProMods? There are no plans because there's nobody who has the time. But maybe somebody from within the community will step in? You never know.

• Will there be AI traffic? TMP is still working on that but they don't get it working to the fullest because SCS Software is still constantly changing the AI traffic's behavior. The moment SCS Software is happy and done, AI will get implemented in TMP (and ProMods).



MORE INFORMATION

TMP and PROMODS will provide us with more information regarding the download and usage of their systems. How-To articles will get published before the official launch.



These were about the most important things that were said during the first hour of the stream and with this probably the most important things we need to know about TMP+PROMODS.

The complete stream can still be found here: https://youtu.be/AlIi-zdaupA

replies.msg:
其實無咩一定要 自己因應自己玩嘅需要而決定最好
以下我可以講少少大路嘅
大致可以分成四種

Map DLC就擴大可駕駛範圍 個人覺得最值得買
尤其是base game大部分地區（德國、法國以外）都係同隻game一齊推出（2012年）
當時嘅路都唔係好靚 感覺係標準嘅copy and paste
DLC黎講
北歐、波羅的海、義大利都好靚，個人認為必買
法國都唔錯不過唔夠上面咁靚
Going East唔靚 但如果想玩Promod或者直接由西歐只經陸路去波羅的海嗰邊就要買埋
黑海無買所以唔知
順帶一提Promod係一個非官方地圖mod 地圖超大 不過要晒所有地圖DLC先可以run到
（雖然現時唔需要黑海DLC但有公佈下一版本開始就要）

Tuning DLC就係改車
其實本身隻game都支援改好多嘢
不過可以更多
直接上steam DLC page睇圖最實際 簡單而言：
- DAF、Benz、Scania就係主要俾返嗰間車廠嘅車
- 米芝蓮同Goodyear就可以用現實中嘅車胎
- Krone同Schwarzmuller就可以用現實中嘅貨櫃
- Wheel Tuning就係可以改車軨嘅更多細節
- Cabin Accessories就車內裝飾
- Raven就大雜燴 乜都有少少
- Windows Flag就係車窗掛旗仔包括國旗 有香港
以上呢啲只係簡介 上面都有講 自己入去store page睇圖最實際

Cargo DLC就係重型貨物為主
同樣地，自己入去睇圖最實際
- High Power：重型貨物不過唔需要特別貨櫃
- Heavy Cargo：更重型貨物 呢批貨櫃較長 會有尾軸轉向（即係轉彎時車尾會向另一方向擺）
- Special Transport：超重型貨物 需要有引導車係前後 貨物亦會過闊或過長或以上皆是
不過留意返，多人遊戲mod暫不支援Special Transport，亦暫時未有時間表

Paint Job就名如其實嘅塗裝
個人認為無咩特別
不過想課金支持開發者我相信無人會阻止你


其實呢隻game都算多DLC
希望我無數漏掛
有錯請指
